qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: DOMParser deep nesting triggers uncaught stack exhaustion during normalize
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory is about processing-instruction serialization in XMLSerializer; this finding is a separate DOMParser normalize-recursion denial-of-service path in different code.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: XMLSerializer comment and processing-instruction serialization permit markup injection
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Its processing-instruction path identifies the same root cause as the advisory: attacker-controlled PI data reaches createProcessingInstruction or PI mutation and XMLSerializer emits it verbatim, so `?>` breaks out of the PI and injects live XML markup.

selected_finding.title: XMLSerializer comment and processing-instruction serialization permit markup injection

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding matches the advisory's processing-instruction breakout root cause, and the copied PoC produced serialized XML where attacker-controlled PI data escaped the PI boundary and reparsed as a real injected element.
evidence: The advisory describes createProcessingInstruction storing attacker-controlled PI data and the serializer emitting `node.data` verbatim, while the finding cites the same PI creation and serialization path in `lib/dom.js`.
The copied PoC mutated PI data to `data?><injected-pi/><?x`, then serialized the vulnerable commit with `requireWellFormed: true`, targeting the advisory's exact `?>` delimiter-breakout behavior.

The run log at `/Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_4ed753af/.judge/poc_runs/xmlserializer_comment_pi_markup_injection/run.log` contains `EVOHUNT_PI_BREAKOUT_CONFIRMED serialized=<root><?target data?><injected-pi/><?x?></root>`, and the helper verified that reparsing produced one real `injected-pi` element.

poc_executions.command: bash -lc 'git clone https://github.com/xmldom/xmldom.git target-repo && git -C target-repo checkout fda7cc313de30243fea35cada64e0bb12099c2a1 && node reproduction/verify.js'
poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC cloned the pinned vulnerable commit and emitted `EVOHUNT_PI_BREAKOUT_CONFIRMED serialized=<root><?target data?><injected-pi/><?x?></root>`, proving attacker-controlled PI data escaped the PI boundary and round-tripped into a real injected `injected-pi` element.
